badges.title: Lube Logistics Coordinator
badges.description: Ensures the necessary supplies are present, accessible, and not mysteriously missing when the infrastructure of pleasure depends on them.

badges.title: Aftercare Angel
badges.description: Provides blankets, water, snacks, reassurance, forehead kisses, grounding, or whatever helps people land softly.

badges.title: Read the Room Ranger
badges.description: Skilled in noticing vibes, body language, social signals, awkward pauses, and when it is time to back up or check in.

badges.title: Bureau of Temporary Intimacy
badges.description: Certified participant in fleeting, meaningful, absurdly well-negotiated moments of queer connection.

badges.title: Hydration Slut
badges.description: Bravely interrupts chaos, flirting, dancing, and poor decisions to remind everyone to drink some water.

badges.title: Did Not Fall in Love With the DJ
badges.description: Awarded for exceptional restraint, emotional discipline, and surviving bass-induced attachment delusions.
